name: Portal Second Age

draft.notes: Back-facing pack. Fixed order: 9 commons + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 2 basic lands. No ad/tip card in the pack.

statedRates: Single 110-card common run: 30 cards appear once (C1), 40 appear twice (C2). No foils.
sourceNotes: Small set with more commons but fewer uncommons/rares than a normal small set. Pre-foil era (1998), no foils. Three variations of each basic land; 2 basic lands per pack. Printed in USA and Belgium; US printing modeled. 36 packs per box.
